import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { experimentsAPI } from '../api'; function CreateExperiment() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', description: '', url_a: '', url_b: '', primary_metric: 'conversion_rate', alpha: 0.05, min_detectable_effect: 0.10, power: 0.80, duration_days: 14, }); const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); try { setLoading(true); const response = await experimentsAPI.create(formData); navigate(`/experiment/${response.data.id}`); } catch (err) { alert('Failed to create experiment: ' + err.message); setLoading(false); } }; const handleChange = (field, value) => { setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })); }; return (

Create New Experiment

Set up an A/B test with automatic analysis

Experiment Configuration

Provide the URLs for both versions and configure parameters

handleChange('name', e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g., Red vs Blue CTA Button" required />
handleChange('description', e.target.value)} placeholder="What hypothesis are you testing?" />
handleChange('url_a', e.target.value)} placeholder="http://localhost:3001" required /> The original/baseline version
handleChange('url_b', e.target.value)} placeholder="http://localhost:3002" required /> The new version with changes to test
handleChange('alpha', parseFloat(e.target.value))} /> Typically 0.05 (5%)
handleChange('power', parseFloat(e.target.value))} /> Typically 0.80 (80%)
handleChange('min_detectable_effect', parseFloat(e.target.value))} /> 0.10 = 10% relative change
handleChange('duration_days', parseInt(e.target.value))} /> How long to run the test
{loading && (

🤖 Running LLM diff analysis on both URLs...

This may take 10-30 seconds

)}
); } export default CreateExperiment;
